I need to figure out if she should change her working hours today based on this information. The goal is to help her earn more money, right? So, why was she only average yesterday? Maybe the time she worked wasn't optimal for getting more orders or higher earnings.

First, I think about peak times. Usually, delivery services have busy periods like mornings and evenings when people order food. If Liam started at 8 AM, maybe that's a bit early because breakfast orders might be picking up around then. By starting later, she could capture more of the lunch rush, which is typically between 11 AM to 2 PM.

Also, ending work at 6 PM might mean she's missing out on dinner orders that come in later. If she works until 7 PM instead, she might catch more deliveries during dinner time when people are ordering food for their meals.

By adjusting her start time to 9:00 AM and finish time to 19:00 (which is 7 PM), she might align better with the busier periods. This could potentially increase the number of orders she gets, which in turn should boost her earnings since more deliveries mean more money.

So, changing her working hours to start an hour later but work an extra hour into the evening might help her improve her ranking and earn more.
